prompt:
You are a senior app security auditor with a hundred million dollar portfolio of built apps. Thoroughly review the Multipaste macOS app codebase for all remaining issues before production launch.

IMPORTANT CONTEXT:
- This is a menu-bar macOS app that intercepts clipboard (Cmd+Shift+V for Cycle & Drop, Cmd+V for FIFO mode)
- It uses CGEventTap, SQLite, PostHog analytics, Supabase backend, Gumroad licensing
- Recent audit fixes (commit ee60ede) addressed: entitlements, LicenseManager, bundle ID standardization, history cap enforcement, Pro feature gating, debug log security, telemetry consent, FIFO pasteboard restore, missing menu items
- Bundle ID is now com.nanthansr.multipaste consistently across all files

YOUR TASK - Check EVERYTHING:

1. SECURITY & PRIVACY:
- Verify no hardcoded secrets, API keys, or credentials remain in source (except Config.swift)
- Check that clipboard content never appears in any log file or network request
- Verify telemetry consent toggle works end-to-end
- Check privacy policy matches actual app behavior
- Verify sandbox is disabled (required for CGEventTap) - no app-sandbox entitlement

2. BUILD & DEPLOYMENT:
- Run Building for production...
[0/3] Write swift-version--1AB21518FC5DEDBE.txt
Build complete! (0.26s) and fix any compilation errors
- Run Building release binary...
[0/1] Planning build
Building for production...
[0/3] Write swift-version--1AB21518FC5DEDBE.txt
[2/3] Compiling PostHog ApplicationLifecyclePublisher.swift
Build complete! (13.34s)
Creating App Bundle structure...
Copying binary...
Copying icon...
Writing Info.plist...
Done! App bundle created at Multipaste.app
Code signing with 'Multipaste Dev'...
Signed. and verify the .app bundle is created
- Check Info.plist has all required keys (LSUIElement, NSAccessibilityUsageDescription, etc.)
- Verify code signing works with the Multipaste Dev certificate

3. FUNCTIONAL VERIFICATION:
- Verify LicenseManager has proper trial logic (14-day, tamper-resistant via Keychain backup)
- Verify Pro features are properly gated (FIFO, image capture, file capture)
- Verify free tier enforces 50-clip history cap
- Check FIFO pasteboard restoration works correctly
- Verify menu items work (Settings, Clear History, License status)

4. CODE QUALITY:
- Run Sources/contextbrain/main.swift:                print(manifest)
Sources/contextbrain/main.swift:                print("Wrote context manifest to \(config.outputURL.path)")
Sources/contextbrain/main.swift:        print("Usage: swift run contextbrain [--root PATH] [--output PATH] [--dry-run]") to confirm no print() statements remain
- Check for TODO/FIXME comments that should be addressed
- Verify all logging uses os.Logger (not fileLog for sensitive data)
- Check for any memory leaks or threading issues

5. FILES TO AUDIT:
- Sources/multipaste/*.swift (all files)
- Package.swift
- scripts/build-app.sh
- multipaste.entitlements
- landing/src/components/PrivacyPolicy.tsx
- README.md

6. MARKETING/COPY:
- Verify pricing is consistent (.99) across README and landing page
- Check Gumroad URL is real (not placeholder)
- Verify no placeholder text like YOUR_NAME or TODO remains

7. FINAL CHECKLIST:
- Build succeeds
- App launches without crash
- Cycle & Drop works (Cmd+Shift+V)
- Radial HUD works (hold Cmd+Shift 300ms)
- FIFO mode shows upgrade prompt on free tier
- Settings window opens from menu
- Clear History works with confirmation dialog
- License activation works

OUTPUT FORMAT:
When all checks pass and issues are resolved, output:
<promise>ALL_CLEAR</promise>

If you find issues, fix them and continue iterating. Document what you found and what you fixed.

Use --max-iterations 15 --agent opencode --no-plugins
